summary: Full regression test run (iteration 2). All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified via screenshots: Dashboard (KPIs: 33 leads, 28 high priority, charts), Lead Discovery (8 AI-generated results per search with AI Generated badge + scores), Lead Database (33 rows, search/filter functional), Lead Detail (AI score gauge, scoring breakdown visible), Outreach Center loads. App is fully functional.

issues: Pie chart renders but the donut area appears empty/blank in the center - pie slices not visible in screenshot, only legend shows. Minor rendering issue.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py ~700 lines - consider splitting into route modules if growing further
REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var must be set in shell for pytest to work (tests use os.environ.get)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 16/16 passing. All major flows verified: Dashboard shows 33 leads/28 high priority/charts/pipeline. Lead Discovery shows 8 AI-simulated results per search. Lead Database shows all leads with search working. Lead Detail shows full scoring breakdown. Google Maps API falls back to AI simulation (intentional). Outreach Center loads. Note: pytest must be run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported in the shell environment.
mocked_apis: /api/leads/discover - simulates Google Maps results (billing not enabled, intentional fallback)
